access_token.description: GoCardless access token, sent as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Never logged.

base_url.description: GoCardless API base URL. Use https://api.gocardless.com for live or https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com for sandbox. Legacy derives this from gocardless_environment when base_url is absent; this declarative bundle requires the fully-formed URL.

gocardless_version.description: GoCardless-Version header value sent on every request.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the four legacy incremental list streams. Sent as created_at[gt].

balances_creditor_id.description: Balances Creditor Id query value for the matching GoCardless stream.

bank_account_detail_id.description: Bank Account Detail Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

bank_account_holder_verification_id.description: Bank Account Holder Verification Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

bank_authorisation_id.description: Bank Authorisation Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

billing_request_id.description: Billing Request Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

billing_request_institutions_country_cod.description: Billing Request Institutions Country Code query value for the matching GoCardless stream.

billing_request_template_id.description: Billing Request Template Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

block_id.description: Block Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

creditor_bank_account_id.description: Creditor Bank Account Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

creditor_id.description: Creditor Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

customer_bank_account_id.description: Customer Bank Account Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

customer_bank_account_token_id.description: Customer Bank Account Token Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

customer_id.description: Customer Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

event_id.description: Event Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

export_id.description: Export Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

funds_availability_amount.description: Funds Availability Amount query value for the matching GoCardless stream.

gc_key_id.description: Optional Gc-Key-Id public key identifier sent for encrypted bank-account-detail reads; omitted when unset.

instalment_schedule_id.description: Instalment Schedule Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

mandate_id.description: Mandate Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

mandate_import_id.description: Mandate Import Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

outbound_payment_id.description: Outbound Payment Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

outbound_payment_import_id.description: Outbound Payment Import Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

payer_authorisation_id.description: Payer Authorisation Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

payment_account_id.description: Payment Account Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

payment_account_transaction_id.description: Payment Account Transaction Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

payment_account_transactions_value_date_.description: Payment Account Transactions Value Date From query value for the matching GoCardless stream.
Payment Account Transactions Value Date To query value for the matching GoCardless stream.

payment_id.description: Payment Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

payout_id.description: Payout Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

redirect_flow_id.description: Redirect Flow Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

refund_id.description: Refund Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

scheme_identifier_id.description: Scheme Identifier Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

subscription_id.description: Subscription Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

tax_rate_id.description: Tax Rate Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

transferred_mandate_id.description: Transferred Mandate Id used by GoCardless stream paths.

verification_details_creditor_id.description: Verification Details Creditor Id query value for the matching GoCardless stream.

webhook_id.description: Webhook Id used by GoCardless stream paths.
